conversion.conversiontitle: Upgrade Report - Atmel Software Framework Upgrade Log

action.resulttext: The Delete operation failed. Could not find the path specified 'src\ASF\sam0\boards\samr34_xplained_pro\board_init.c'. Resolution failed for folder: 'boards'

action.description: Remove folder '../src/ASF/sam0/boards/samr34_xplained_pro' from include search path.

moduleinfo.name: USART - Serial interface- SAM implementation for devices with only USART
RTC - Real Time Counter in Count Mode (Callback APIs)
SERCOM I2C - Master Mode I2C (Callback APIs)
SERCOM SPI - Serial Peripheral Interface (Callback APIs)
LoRaWAN MAC include files for library

action.description: Add folder '../src/ASF/thirdparty/wireless/lorawan/sal/inc' to include search path.
